content:
---

### IV. | GLYPH USE CASES

Symbols can be used in:
- Internal documentation (folder headers, GitHub files)
- Creative interfaces (apps, ritual generators, UI overlays)
- Print artifacts (zines, books, guides)
- Public brand systems (logos, project sigils)

---

### V. | DEVELOPMENT QUESTIONS

- Do you want each symbol to evolve (versioned per phase)?
- Should glyphs ever repeat across domains for poetic reasons?
- Do you want a standalone glyph key as a zine/module?

---

### VI. | NEXT STEP OPTIONS

- [ ] Build starter glyph table (with sample symbols for all current Artist IDs and Projects)
- [ ] Output Markdown version for GitHub repo
- [ ] Begin ASCII-based rendering for mobile and command-line use
